message:
Command `# VDDIO has TWO locations in DEF:
# Line 232519: in PINS section with DIRECTION INOUT
# Line 402682: in NET section with PIN reference
# The bterm has 2 pins = DRT-0302.
#
# Let's see the full context around each VDDIO occurrence in the PINS section
grep -n "VDDIO" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def | head -5
echo "---look for all pins section entries---"
# Count VDDIO pin entries in PINS section (between PINS header and END PINS)
python3 -c "
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.def') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
    
in_pins = False
vddio_count = 0
vddio_lines = []
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if 'PINS ' in line and not '#' in line.split('PINS')[0]:
        in_pins = True
    if 'END PINS' in line:
        in_pins = False
    if in_pins and 'VDDIO' in line:
        vddio_count += 1
        vddio_lines.append((i+1, line.strip()))
        
print(f'VDDIO appearances in PINS section: {vddio_count}')
for ln, l in vddio_lines[:5]:
    print(f'  Line {ln}: {l}')
"` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
232519:    - VDDIO + NET VDDIO + DIRECTION INOUT + USE SIGNAL
402682:    - VDDIO ( PIN VDDIO ) + USE SIGNAL ;
---look for all pins section entries---
VDDIO appearances in PINS section: 1
  Line 232519: - VDDIO + NET VDDIO + DIRECTION INOUT + USE SIGNAL
